surpriseMode._comment: When enabled, generation parameters (topics, style, difficulty, part count) are selected randomly via the randomization script. When disabled, the agent asks the user interactively for each parameter.

hideProblemDetails._comment: Master switch for hiding problem details during generation. When enabled is false, all hide* flags are ignored.

hideTopics._comment: When true, topics are not revealed to the user at any point during generation.

hideStyle._comment: When true, the style (LeetCode or real-world) is not revealed.

hidePartCount._comment: When true, the number of parts is never mentioned during or after generation.

hideWriteOutput._comment: When true, all file writing goes through the write script (.agents/scripts/write-problem.js) to prevent file contents from appearing in the terminal.
